description: A craniomaxillofacial surgeon has designed a custom surgical cutting guide in external CAD software. Your task is to verify its fit against the patient's anatomy. Using the loaded CT scan, generate a 3D surface of the skull using the 'Bone' preset. Import the surgical guide model from /home/ga/Documents/surgical_guide.stl and change its color to Red to distinguish it from the bone. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/guide_verification.inv3. Login credentials (if needed): username 'ga', password 'password123'.
